title: 3 Pack 18/8 Stainless Steel Colander Sieves(5-Quart, 4-Quart and 3-Quart), Mesh Strainer Net Baskets with Handles & Resting Base for Strain, Drain, Rinse or Steam
features: Food Grade Stainless Steel 18/8 Construction: Our kitchen strainer is made of first class Stainless Steel 18/8 that is BPA free, Lead and Cadmium free. It is rust free and will never affect the taste of your food! ad and Cadmium free. It is rust free and will never affect the taste of your food!

Sturdy: Our colanders feature a sturdy outer mirror finished wide rimmed framework design on both the top and the resting base on the bottom. The firm wire along the outer sides of the rust-proof firm mesh netting keeps the baskets in shape and sturdy while in use. Our premium handles are riveted to the bowl so it will never come off!

Three Different Sizes: Large 5-Quart (11" x 4"), Medium 4-Quart (9 1/2" x 3 3/4") and Small 3-Quart (8 1/2" x 3 1/4"). Convenient sizes for all your cooking, straining and preparation needs. They're perfect for sifting and straining wet or dry ingredients.

Versatile: Our colander basket strainers are perfect for draining and straining all kinds of foods, wet or dry ingredients, from pasta to produce. Sift flour, sugar and rice. Use for food preparation like rinsing and washing fruits, vegetables, grains and pastas. Use in a pot to steam vegetables, fry foods like french fries or to cook pasta.
Space Saving: Our colanders can nest together for space saving storage. They're easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
description: Package included: 3 Pack Different Sizes Colander, perfect for sifting, filtering and straining. Dimensions: Large 5-Quart (11" x 4") Medium 4-Quart (9 1/2" x 3 3/4") Small 3-Quart (8 1/2" x 3 1/4") Is your current food strainer rusty and hard to clean? Our fantastic strainer is made of 100% stainless steel for easy cleaning. We used only the highest quality stainless steel available to ensure hygienic water draining. Simply set it in the dishwasher for a fast, hygienic, and perfect cleaning. Even without a dishwasher, this colander is so easy to clean—just put it under running water and it will be as good a new, ready to be used again. This colander won’t rust, bend, or break! Are your current food strainer's handles come off easliy? We studied a lot. We improved our colander handles with rivet. Our premium handles are riveted to the bowl so it will never come off! You'll never have to worry about handles coming off or a freak accident due to excessive weight contents in the colander while holding it.
